rationale: Author-of-record lens holds at c92b3d26. git show lists exactly internal/config/config.go + internal/config/config_test.go. Diff matches plan Bead 4: superseding doc comments on Reviewer.model() and validateReviewerEntries plus a new TestLoad_EmptyStringModel; no struct or unmarshal change (Model stays a plain string), no logic change. The round-2 delta is confined to subtest (b), which now additionally asserts the distinctive `sets neither "model" nor "family"` phrase to uniquely pin the neither-set branch and prevent a spurious pass from the count>=1 branch — a strict tightening. go build ./... clean; go test ./internal/config green; TestLoad_EmptyStringModel passes fresh (-count=1). Worktree clean.
